CardDex: TCG Scanner & Price

Your Ultimate Pokemon Card Collecting Companion Know exactly what your cards are worth.

Download Free on the App Store

What CardDex does

Your Ultimate Pokemon Card Collecting Companion

Know exactly what your cards are worth. Pokemon Card Scanner & Value gives you real eBay sold prices for every Pokemon card — so you always know what your collection is actually worth.

Comprehensive Features

Instant Card Scanner

  • Point your camera at any Pokemon card and identify it in seconds using on-device OCR
  • No barcodes, no manual lookup — just scan and go
  • Works offline, no server required

Real eBay Market Prices

  • Every price is sourced from actual eBay sold listings
  • See the median sale price based on real transactions, not estimates
  • Prices updated regularly across 27,000+ cards

Smart Collection Management

  • Add cards to your collection with a tap
  • Create and organize custom folders and binders
  • Track your total collection value at a glance
  • Personalized watchlist to monitor your favorite cards

Browse the Full Card Database

  • 27,000+ cards from every English set — Base Set through the latest Scarlet & Violet releases
  • Search by name, artist, rarity, set, or Pokedex number
  • Browse complete set lists with high-resolution card images
  • Intelligent search grid with sleek UI

Built for Collectors Whether you're buying, selling, trading, or just curious — this app gives you the data you need to make smart decisions. Perfect for casual collectors, competitive players, and serious investors alike.

Privacy and Performance

  • Secure by Design: Zero data collection or tracking
  • Offline Image Caching: Fast, seamless browsing with locally stored card images
  • High-Performance Architecture: Built for speed and smooth user experience
  • All data processing occurs locally on your device

Start scanning your collection today.

Legal Notice and Disclaimer

Trademark & Copyright Acknowledgment

  • This app is a fan-created tool designed for Pokemon Trading Card Game enthusiasts
  • This app is not officially associated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Nintendo, The Pokemon Company, Creatures Inc., or GAME FREAK Inc.
  • All Pokemon-related names, images, and trademarks are the property of their respective copyright holders
  • The content within this app is intended for informational and personal collection management purposes only

Intellectual Property Statement The developers of this app respect all intellectual property rights and have created this tool as an independent reference application for Pokemon card collectors. Any usage of trademarked material is strictly for referential purposes under fair use principles.

User Responsibility Users are solely responsible for their interactions with the app and any collection management decisions. The app provides information and tools but does not guarantee the accuracy of market values or card information.

Get CardDex for iPhone

Your Ultimate Pokemon Card Collecting Companion Know exactly what your cards are worth.
